message:
Add CGSHWCaptureWindowList for capturing minimized/other-space windows

Use private API to capture window screenshots that ScreenCaptureKit
cannot access (minimized windows, windows on other Spaces).

- Add CGSMainConnectionID and CGSWindowCaptureOptions declarations
- Implement captureWindowViaPrivateAPI helper function
- Integrate as fallback in thumbnail, OCR, and preview capture paths
- Key fix: Use CGSMainConnectionID (UInt32) not SLSMainConnectionID (Int32)

Based on AltTab's implementation of the same private API.
